---
name: Growth Task
about: Create a structured SEO/GEO/ASO growth task for an AI coding agent
title: "[Growth Task] "
labels: ["growth", "agent-ready", "needs-human-review"]
assignees: ""
---

# Growth Task

## 1. Goal

Describe the growth objective.

Example:

```text
Create a comparison page targeting users searching for "AI flashcard app vs Anki".
```

---

## 2. Channel

Select one or more:

- [ ] SEO
- [ ] GEO
- [ ] ASO
- [ ] Technical SEO
- [ ] GitHub README
- [ ] GitHub Pages
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] App Store metadata draft
- [ ] Weekly report

---

## 3. Target Surface

Select one or more:

- [ ] README
- [ ] GitHub Pages
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Blog
- [ ] FAQ
- [ ] Comparison page
- [ ] Use-case page
- [ ] Benchmark page
- [ ] Error-solving page
- [ ] Release notes
- [ ] App Store metadata
- [ ] Screenshot copy draft

---

## 4. Target Query / Prompt / Keyword

```text
Primary query:
Secondary queries:
Alternative queries:
Competitor queries:
Error queries:
GEO prompts:
ASO keywords:
```

---

## 5. Target User

```text
Who is searching for this?
What problem do they have?
What existing solution are they using?
What makes them dissatisfied?
What conversion action do we want?
```

---

## 6. Evidence

List the evidence behind this task.

Examples:

```text
Google Search Console query:
Reddit thread:
Hacker News discussion:
GitHub Issue:
App Store review:
Competitor page:
Search trend:
Internal analytics:
```

Do not use unsupported claims. If evidence is weak, mark the task as `needs-validation`.

---

## 7. Opportunity Score

```text
Search demand:
Product fit:
Competition weakness:
Conversion intent:
GEO gap:
ASO value:
Implementation cost:
Evidence quality:
Risk score:
Final opportunity score:
```

---

## 8. Files Allowed to Modify

```text
README.md
docs/index.md
docs/comparison/example.md
docs/use-cases/example.md
CHANGELOG.md
growth/reports/example.md
```

Do not modify files outside this list unless explicitly approved.

---

## 9. Required Sections

- [ ] Definition
- [ ] Target user
- [ ] Problem
- [ ] Solution
- [ ] Step-by-step guide
- [ ] Comparison table
- [ ] FAQ
- [ ] Evidence / benchmark
- [ ] Screenshots / demo reference
- [ ] Last updated date
- [ ] Internal links
- [ ] External sources
- [ ] Measurement plan

---

## 10. Constraints

- No fake claims
- No fake reviews
- No fake benchmarks
- No fake user stories
- No keyword stuffing
- No copied competitor content
- No unsupported superiority claims
- No automatic App Store submission
- No legal, pricing, privacy, checkout or authentication changes unless explicitly approved
- Keep tone factual
- Open a pull request for review

---

## 11. Validation Checklist

- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Links work
- [ ] Metadata is valid
- [ ] Structured data is valid if added
- [ ] Claims are supported
- [ ] Internal links are relevant
- [ ] Page is not thin or spam-like
- [ ] Risk level is acceptable

---

## 12. Measurement Plan

Track after merge:

- [ ] Google Search Console impressions
- [ ] Google Search Console clicks
- [ ] average position
- [ ] CTR
- [ ] indexed status
- [ ] AI engine mention rate
- [ ] AI citation rate
- [ ] competitor share-of-answer
- [ ] signup / trial / install conversion
- [ ] App Store keyword ranking if relevant

Suggested windows:

```text
7 days
14 days
28 days
```

---

## 13. Suggested Agent Instruction

```text
Please implement this growth task by modifying only the allowed files.
Keep the tone factual, clear and evidence-based.
Do not fabricate claims, benchmarks, reviews, sources or user stories.
Create a small, reviewable pull request.
Include validation and measurement notes in the PR body.
```

---

## 14. Definition of Done

- [ ] Page or README section created/updated
- [ ] Metadata improved if relevant
- [ ] Internal links added if relevant
- [ ] FAQ added if relevant
- [ ] Claims supported by evidence
- [ ] Last updated date added if relevant
- [ ] PR opened
- [ ] Report or issue updated
